references.hebrew: וַאֲשֶׁ֣ר אָכְלוּ֮ שְׁאֵ֣ר עַמִּי֒ וְעוֹרָם֙ מֵעֲלֵיהֶ֣ם הִפְשִׁ֔יטוּ וְאֶת־עַצְמֹֽתֵיהֶ֖ם פִּצֵּ֑חוּ וּפָֽרְשׂוּ֙ כַּאֲשֶׁ֣ר בַּסִּ֔יר וּכְבָשָׂ֖ר בְּת֥וֹךְ קַלָּֽחַת׃
references.english:
You have devoured My people’s flesh;
You have flayed the skin off them,
And after tearing their skins off them,
And their flesh off their bones,bAnd after tearing their skins off them, / And their flesh off their bones Moved down from v. 2 for clarity.
And breaking their bones to bits,
You have cut it up as intocas into Meaning of Heb. uncertain; Septuagint and Syriac read “like flesh in.” a pot,
Like meat in a cauldron.

commentary_links.hebrew: אִ֥ישׁ אִישׁ֙ אֶל־כׇּל־שְׁאֵ֣ר בְּשָׂר֔וֹ לֹ֥א תִקְרְב֖וּ לְגַלּ֣וֹת עֶרְוָ֑ה אֲנִ֖י יְהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
commentary_links.english: Not even one of youayou Addressing men, since by convention they were treated as the active agent in heterosexual relations. shall come near anyone of his own flesh to uncover nakedness: I am GOD.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: זו עונה וכן הוא אומר איש איש אל כל שאר בשרו לא תקרבו לגלות

commentary_links.hebrew: אִם־אַחֶ֖רֶת יִֽקַּֽח־ל֑וֹ שְׁאֵרָ֛הּ כְּסוּתָ֥הּ וְעֹנָתָ֖הּ לֹ֥א יִגְרָֽע׃
commentary_links.english: If he takes another to wife, he must not withhold from this one her food, her clothing, or her conjugal rights.bconjugal rights Or “ointments.”
commentary_links.matched_snippet: לשאינו מצוי &star אמר רבא האי תנא סבר מזונות מדאורייתא דתניא שארה אלו

commentary_links.hebrew: אִם־תְּעַנֶּ֣ה אֶת־בְּנֹתַ֗י וְאִם־תִּקַּ֤ח נָשִׁים֙ עַל־בְּנֹתַ֔י אֵ֥ין אִ֖ישׁ עִמָּ֑נוּ רְאֵ֕ה אֱלֹהִ֥ים עֵ֖ד בֵּינִ֥י וּבֵינֶֽךָ׃
commentary_links.english: If you ill-treat my daughters or take other wives besides my daughters—though no one elseqno one else Among the witnesses to this agreement, who should intervene if it is violated; cf. Kimhi. be about, remember, it is God who will be witness between you and me.”

commentary_links.hebrew: וַֽיְעַנְּךָ֮ וַיַּרְעִבֶ֒ךָ֒ וַיַּאֲכִֽלְךָ֤ אֶת־הַמָּן֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר לֹא־יָדַ֔עְתָּ וְלֹ֥א יָדְע֖וּן אֲבֹתֶ֑יךָ לְמַ֣עַן הוֹדִֽיעֲךָ֗ כִּ֠י לֹ֣א עַל־הַלֶּ֤חֶם לְבַדּוֹ֙ יִחְיֶ֣ה הָֽאָדָ֔ם כִּ֛י עַל־כׇּל־מוֹצָ֥א פִֽי־יְהֹוָ֖ה יִחְיֶ֥ה הָאָדָֽם׃
commentary_links.english: [God] subjected you to the hardship of hunger and then gave you manna to eat, which neither you nor your ancestors had ever known, in order to teach you that a human being does not live on bread alone, but that one may live on anything that G<small>OD</small> decrees.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: זו עונה וכן הוא אומר איש איש אל כל שאר בשרו לא תקרבו לגלות
